query:
UPDATE learning_paths 
SET description = 'Perfect for those new to theological study. Build a strong foundation in biblical knowledge, discipleship principles, and learn to confidently share your faith with others.',
    goal = 'Master the fundamentals of Christian theology, develop discipleship skills, and gain confidence in evangelism and faith-sharing'
WHERE level = 'beginner';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute UPDATE learning_paths 
SET description = 'Perfect for those new to theological study. Build a strong foundation in biblical knowledge, discipleship principles, and learn to confidently share your faith with others.',
    goal = 'Master the fundamentals of Christian theology, develop discipleship skills, and gain confidence in evangelism and faith-sharing'
WHERE level = 'beginner';
